current_program_level: M0 only; below P0 runtime proof

ladder.criterion: One fixture traverses selected owner boundaries; it is not production-ready.
ladder.name: walking skeleton

ladder.criterion: The terminal M9 journey works with adversarial evidence in an IOI-controlled environment.
ladder.name: internal product proof

ladder.criterion: Independent users complete the journey on their data with disclosed support and limits.
ladder.name: external design-partner proof

ladder.criterion: Applicable required-now and selected conditional gates close and recovery thresholds pass.
ladder.name: production-integrated profile

ladder.criterion: One logical System preserves continuity and performs useful work across admitted nodes.
ladder.name: distributed L0 proof

ladder.criterion: Independently governed Systems demonstrate useful positive-surplus work and portable exit.
ladder.name: sovereign cooperation proof

ladder.criterion: A selected live hardware profile passes its physical-action, runtime, and production gates.
ladder.name: embodied deployment proof

ladder.criterion: Connected and secured services show recurring external demand and sustainable security economics.
ladder.name: public network demand proof
